Risk Description: In bolt rewrite project, there are two teams (Pod X & development Pods). The task of Pod X team is to ensure there are enough approved stories available so that development pods can pick them up during the upcoming sprints. The risk highlighted here is the inflow of approved stories is less and there is a risk and it can have an impact for the development pods during the upcoming sprints.
Potential Impact: Medium - Insufficient approved user stories can lead to margin impact and delivery disruption for development pods.

Risk Description: Bolt Rewrite & POD X project has started from 1st April 2024 and it is currently with United Finance team for approval. Generally there is a lengthy process at united to get the SoWs approved, hence there is a delay in getting the SoWs approved.
Potential Impact: Medium - Delays in SoW approval can cause financial impact and project execution delays.

Risk Description: As part of the BGV process, for 5 resources BGV has highlighted discrepancies. 1 Resource has been offboarded and for the 4 resources the status is in progress. In case if we need to offboard further resources, there will be high impact to the project and there would have an impact with the client confidence.
Potential Impact: High - BGV discrepancies may result in reputation loss, financial impact, and reduced client confidence.

Risk Description: EQE team is doing the overall testing for Release 1. EQE team has highlighted they dont have enough bandwidth to complete the testing by 16th August.
Potential Impact: Medium - Insufficient testing bandwidth can lead to margin impact and delivery delays.

Risk Description: For Fedex Integration required an Organization account to be setup for higher environment. As of now for development, local accounts are being used. Working with Fedex team to check on this. Without the Fedex Organization account setup we will not be able to deploy the Fedex changes to production environment.
Potential Impact: Medium - Lack of Fedex organization account setup can prevent production deployment and cause margin impact.
